== Notes for [[Item:Q107861|Q107861]] ==

* '''Abbasid Governor of Syria & Egypt'''

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ibrahim_ibn_Salih

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Salih_ibn_Ali

Source 3: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abd_al-Malik_ibn_Salih

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000025181835840

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
